patches.description: Prevent /_global-error from being statically generated (Node.js 24 + React 19 compat)
patches.old:
isStatic: true,
            isRoutePPREnabled: false,
            prerenderFallbackMode: undefined,
            prerenderedRoutes: undefined,
            rootParamKeys: undefined,
            hasStaticProps: false,
            hasServerProps: false,
            isNextImageImported: false,
            appConfig: {}
patches.new:
isStatic: false,
            isRoutePPREnabled: false,
            prerenderFallbackMode: undefined,
            prerenderedRoutes: undefined,
            rootParamKeys: undefined,
            hasStaticProps: false,
            hasServerProps: false,
            isNextImageImported: false,
            appConfig: { revalidate: 0 }

patches.description: Set revalidate:0 for appConfig of _global-error (secondary fix)
